task:
Fix failing CI on PR #2196: fix(canvas): ensure PPTX export handles all agent output types

## Instructions

1. `cd ~/2025slideheroes-sophie`
2. `git fetch origin && git checkout sophie/pptx-agent-compat && git pull origin sophie/pptx-agent-compat`
3. Analyze the CI failure logs below
4. Diagnose the root cause
5. Fix the issue
6. Run `pnpm format:fix && pnpm lint:fix && pnpm typecheck` locally to verify
7. Also run any relevant tests: `pnpm test` or specific test files
8. Commit with: `git commit -m "fix: CI failure on PR #2196"`
9. Push: `git push origin sophie/pptx-agent-compat`
